roster_delta.desc: Miami Marlins signed free agent RHP Junior Pina to a minor league contract.
Pittsburgh Pirates placed C Henry Davis on the paternity list.
Pittsburgh Pirates signed free agent OF Jean Rodriguez to a minor league contract.
Pittsburgh Pirates placed CF Oneil Cruz on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 8, 2026. Left hand fourth and fifth metacarpal non-displaced fractures.
